violations.text: Allergen statement is lacking on menu. Establishment is to add an allergy statement to menu. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils ice machine were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was turned off and put out of order at the time of inspection. Establishment is not to use ice machine until it is properly cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026

The doors to the outside, located in the main entrance and hallway by bathrooms, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2026
The dish machine in the kitchen was observed in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2026

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. Establishment is to obtain thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2026
The floor in the mop sink area is in poor repair, observed hole with exposed concrete. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2026
The ceiling in the service area is covered with wood panels that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026

The floor behind the 2 door slider area has an accumulation of soil residue, droppings, and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026

The door to the outside, located in hallway, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of dirty tray) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the freezer shelving have an accumulation of frost buildup. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the dish racks have an accumulation of black and brown residue. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024

The floors in the kitchen area are constructed of partially painted concrete which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Repeat violation. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2022
The ceiling in the ware-washing area is covered with wood panels. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2024
The floor in the mop sink area is in poor repair, observed hole with exposed concrete. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2024
The ceiling in the kitchen area (above ovens) is in poor repair, observed chipping paint. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024
